---
name: User Story
about: Create a user story for new functionality
title: '[USER STORY] '
labels: ['user-story', 'enhancement']
assignees: ''
---

## User Story

**As a** [type of user]  
**I want** [some goal]  
**So that** [some reason/benefit]

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Given [context], when [action], then [expected outcome]
- [ ] Given [context], when [action], then [expected outcome]
- [ ] Given [context], when [action], then [expected outcome]

## Additional Context

### Current Behavior

Describe how the system currently behaves (if applicable)

### Expected Behavior

Describe the desired behavior after implementing this user story

### User Experience Considerations

- [ ] Mobile responsive design
- [ ] Accessibility considerations
- [ ] Performance impact
- [ ] SEO considerations (if applicable)

## Technical Notes

### Implementation Approach

Brief description of potential implementation approach

### Dependencies

- List any dependencies on other features/stories
- External service integrations (Yelp API, Google OAuth, etc.)

### Testing Requirements

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] System tests (using existing Cuprite setup)
- [ ] Manual testing scenarios

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Feature implemented according to acceptance criteria
- [ ] All tests passing (including existing test suite)
- [ ] Code follows project conventions (RuboCop, prettier, etc.)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] Tested on mobile devices
- [ ] Accessibility verified
- [ ] Performance impact assessed
- [ ] Feature flag considerations (using Flipper)

## Related Issues

Link any related issues, user stories, or epics

## Screenshots/Mockups

Include any relevant design mockups or screenshots
